steps.title: Spot the source-connection clue
steps.content: The passage states that “African languages also made important contributions to the Puerto Rican dialect.” This tells us the vowel sounds should have their roots in African languages.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Traced” means “found to originate from,” so the Puerto Rican vowel sounds originate from Yoruba speech patterns — this reflects the passage's point about African language contribution. The other three (announced, offered, surrendered) don't convey origin relationships and don't fit “can be ___ to” meaningfully. That matches choice C — C is correct.
